title: Tallaga
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tallaga''' was one of the largest [[City/Legends|cities]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sucharme]], and was the location of a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], [[Tallaga Garrison]], prior to the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

When the planetary government failed to pay an outstanding debt, the Federation shut down the Tallaga garrison and launched an invasion of Sucharme. However, many of the garrison's [[Officer/Legends|officers]] and [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] escaped before the lock-down, including [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Veril Acamma]], and aided in launching a counter-strike with the armed forces against the invaders. The Federation was eventually forced to abandon its invasion attempt.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''
